# FontFX — Canva Chinese Italic & Text Effects Plugin

> FontFX is a Canva app plugin that enables Chinese (CJK) italic text and 9 visual text effects directly inside the Canva editor. No Photoshop or Illustrator required.

## Overview

FontFX solves a critical gap: **Canva does not natively support Chinese italic text**. FontFX lets users tilt Chinese characters from 0° to 35°, apply professional text effects, and insert the result directly into their Canva designs — all without leaving the Canva editor.

## Product Details

- **Name**: FontFX
- **Type**: Canva App Plugin (SaaS)
- **Website**: https://font-fx.com/
- **Contact**: support@font-fx.com
- **Languages**: Traditional Chinese (zh-Hant), English (en)
- **Pricing**: Free tier (5 uses/day) or Premium $14.9 USD one-time lifetime purchase
- **Refund Policy**: 7-day unconditional money-back guarantee
- **Payment Processor**: Lemon Squeezy

## Key Features

1. **Chinese Italic Text (0°–35°)**: The only Canva plugin that supports CJK character tilting
2. **9 Visual Effects**: Neon glow, 3D depth, Metallic, Outer glow, Inner shadow, Long shadow, Mirror reflection, Bubble text, Glitch effect
3. **Dual-layer Stroke**: Independent inner and outer stroke control with customizable colors and widths
4. **Gradient Fill**: Linear and radial gradient modes with 2-5 color stops
5. **Arc Text Layout**: Radius 50-500px for badges, stamps, and circular designs
6. **Text Background Plates**: Rounded rectangle and capsule shapes with adjustable opacity and padding
7. **22+ Built-in Fonts**: 6 Chinese + 16 English fonts, plus custom font upload (TTF/OTF/WOFF2)
8. **32+ Style Presets**: One-click presets for TikTok, Xiaohongshu, YouTube thumbnails, e-commerce banners, etc.
9. **Multi-resolution PNG Output**: 1x / 2x / 3x resolution export for crisp high-DPI output

## Target Users

- **Social Media Managers**: Quick production of eye-catching Chinese title text for daily posts
- **Content Creators**: IG posts, Reels covers, YouTube thumbnails — fast visual effects
- **E-commerce Designers**: Promotional banners, product image text effects, bulk asset production

## Common Questions

**Q: Can Canva do Chinese italic text?**
A: Canva natively does NOT support Chinese italic. FontFX plugin enables Chinese text tilting (0°–35°) directly inside Canva, without switching to Photoshop or Illustrator.

**Q: What text effects does FontFX support?**
A: FontFX provides 9 visual effects: Neon, 3D, Metallic, Outer Glow, Inner Shadow, Long Shadow, Reflection, Bubble, and Glitch. Plus italic tilting, dual-layer stroke, gradient fill, arc text, and text plates.

**Q: How much does FontFX cost?**
A: Free tier includes 5 daily uses with basic effects. Premium is $14.9 USD one-time payment for lifetime access to all features with unlimited usage. 7-day money-back guarantee included.

**Q: Do I need design skills?**
A: No. FontFX includes 32+ one-click style presets (Xiaohongshu covers, TikTok titles, etc.) for instant professional results. All parameters have intuitive slider controls.

**Q: Can I edit text after placing it on the canvas?**
A: Yes. FontFX uses Canva's App Element API, so clicking placed text reopens the plugin panel for full editing of text content, angle, effects, and all parameters.

**Q: What fonts are supported?**
A: 22 built-in fonts (6 Chinese including PingFang, Source Han, Kaiti + 16 English). Premium users can upload custom TTF/OTF/WOFF2 fonts.

**Q: What is the output format?**
A: PNG with transparent background. Free version outputs at 1x resolution. Premium supports 1x, 2x, and 3x for high-resolution displays.

## Technical Details

- Built with Canva Apps SDK
- Renders text effects on HTML5 Canvas, exports as PNG
- App Element API for re-editable placed elements
- No user data stored on external servers
- GDPR-compliant privacy practices
